name: TrustBoost-PII-Sanitizer
description: Blockchain-verified privacy layer that sanitizes PII (emails, keys, passwords, phone numbers, addresses) before sending data to LLMs. Integrates with Solana for payment verification via Helius oracle.
author: teodorofodocrispin-cmyk

text.description: The text containing potential PII to be sanitized

tx_hash.description: Solana transaction hash for payment verification. Use 'TRIAL' for free tier (50 free sanitizations).

wallet_address.description: Your Solana wallet address (optional, used for audit trail)

sanitized_content.description: Text with all PII replaced by [REDACTED] tag

entities_removed.description: True if any PII entities were detected and redacted

safety_score.description: Quantitative risk score from 0.0 (clean) to 1.0 (high risk)

risk_category.description: Qualitative risk classification: CRITICAL (keys/passwords/financial), PRIVATE (emails/IDs/phones), SENSITIVE (handles/locations)

quota_remaining.description: Remaining requests before quota is exhausted

quota_limit.description: Total quota limit: 50 for TRIAL, 10,000 for paid license

privacy.note: Raw input text is never stored. Only character length is logged for operational traceability.

trial.description: Free tier — 50 sanitizations to evaluate the service. No payment required.

paid.description: Full license — 10,000 sanitizations upon verified payment of 149 USDC on Solana.

402.description: Transaction amount is below the required 149 USDC threshold.

403.description: Request quota has been reached (50 for TRIAL, 10,000 for paid). Acquire a new license to continue.
